Hindi: आखिरी सहारे के रूप में किसी का उपयोग करना.
Example: He has his savings to fall back on.

set61.word: The theory rests _____ two basic principles.
explanation: 'Rest on' means to depend or be based on.
Hindi: किसी आधार पर टिका होना.
Example: The theory rests on two basic principles.
Hindi: किसी काम में आवश्यक योग्यता रखना.
Example: She is competent in her work.
Hindi: किसी की कमी में तड़पना.
Example: He pined for his lost dog.

set61.word: He shows a real aptitude _____ mathematics.
explanation: Hindi: किसी काम की स्वाभाविक योग्यता.
Example: He shows a real aptitude for mathematics.

set61.word: His fondness _____ sweets is well known.
explanation: Example: His fondness for sweets is well known.

set61.word: She has a penchant _____ vintage clothes.
explanation: 'Penchant for' means a strong habitual liking.
Hindi: किसी चीज़ के प्रति गहरी और स्थायी रुचि.
Example: She has a penchant for vintage clothes.

set61.word: He felt a strong affinity _____ the place.
explanation: 'Affinity for' means a natural liking or sympathy.
Hindi: किसी के प्रति स्वाभाविक लगाव.
Example: He felt a strong affinity for the place.

set61.word: I have a deep affection _____ my hometown.
explanation: 'Affection for' means a gentle feeling of fondness.
Hindi: किसी के प्रति कोमल स्नेह.
Example: I have a deep affection for my hometown.

set61.word: The disease is caused by a deficiency _____ Vitamin C.
explanation: 'Deficiency of' means a lack or shortage.
Example: The disease is caused by a deficiency of Vitamin C.

set62.word: I was amazed _____ his incredible speed.
explanation: Hindi: किसी बात से बेहद हैरान होना.
Example: I was amazed at his incredible speed.

set62.word: She is eager _____ learn new things.
explanation: 'Eager to' means strongly wanting to do something.
Hindi: किसी काम को करने के लिए बेहद उत्सुक.
Example: She is eager to learn new things.
'Accede to' means agree to a demand or request.
Hindi: किसी मांग या अनुरोध को स्वीकार करना.
Example: The authorities acceded to their demands.

set62.word: He is very careless _____ his money.
explanation: 'Careless with' means not careful with physical items.
Hindi: किसी चीज़ को संभालने में लापरवाह.
Example: He is very careless with his money.
'Take care of' means to look after someone or something.
Example: Please take care of your health.
'Ready to' means prepared for an action.
Hindi: किसी काम के लिए तैयार.
Example: The team is ready to play.

set62.word: The small animal almost died _____ fright.
explanation: 'Died of' means cause of death by emotion or illness.
Hindi: भावना/बीमारी के कारण मृत्यु होना.
Example: The small animal almost died of fright.

set62.word: They moved to the city in pursuit _____ better jobs.
explanation: 'Pursuit of' means the act of striving for.
Hindi: किसी चीज़ को पाने का प्रयास.
Example: They moved to the city in pursuit of better jobs.

set62.word: He fought the urge _____ call her.
explanation: 'Urge to' means strong desire or push to do something.
Hindi: किसी काम को करने की तीव्र इच्छा.
Example: He fought the urge to call her.
